data.title: How SharkNinja is preparing its site to incorporate Salesforce agents
data.description: SharkNinja is still in beta using Salesforce's Agentforce, and the feature is therefore not live on the retailer's ecommerce websites yet. It'll launch when SharkNinja does social commerce early this fall.

data.title: Q&A: Why B2B leaders turn to AI and data integration to power omnichannel growth
data.description: Rob Bonham, managing director of the Demand Generation Group at BDO Digital, highlights a critical shift in B2B omnichannel strategy.

data.title: Graybar names a new executive to lead digital and ecommerce growth
data.description: The distributor says its ecommerce platform provides around-the-clock access to pricing, availability, and order tracking for products distributed from more than 350 locations across North America.

data.title: MSC Industrial ecommerce strategy gains traction as Q3 sales hold steady
data.description: The company also made a leadership move to accelerate its digital roadmap, naming John Reichelt as chief information officer during the quarter.

data.title: Sam's Club's MAP retail media network debuts new measurement tool for advertisers
data.description: The Omni‑Impact tool will offer Sam's Club MAP advertisers custom reports for campaign performance and recommended strategies.
